Clay Garden Press
Posts About

Privacy & disclosures

Affiliate disclosure

Some links on this site are affiliate links. If you click an affiliate link and make a purchase, we may earn a commission at no additional cost to you. This helps keep the site running. We only link to products and services we'd actually use ourselves or have personally researched.

We are a participant in various affiliate programs including, where applicable, the Amazon Services LLC Associates Program.

Analytics

We use Cloudflare Web Analytics, which is privacy-respecting and does not use cookies, fingerprinting, or track individual visitors across sites.

Email

If you sign up for our newsletter (when we launch one), we'll use your email only to send you posts and occasional notes from us. Never sold, never rented, never shared with third parties. Unsubscribe is a one-click link in every email.

AI-generated content disclosure

Some posts on this site are drafted with the assistance of large language models and then reviewed and edited. Every published post is fact-checked against primary sources before going live. If you find a mistake, please email hello@claygardenpress.com — we update posts when we learn we got something wrong.

Contact

Questions about this policy? Email hello@claygardenpress.com.

Last updated: May 2026
